{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320150722416F9FDF97A8E1E297D7\"}"},"total":301},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6870829991891271688","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的书，有参加军旅的朋友，可以先看看这个，你们不会在军队显得迷茫。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1599739773,"group_id":"6855113267002477576","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这是个危险人物，不搭理你是为了你安全。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7eEj1DmuD6exlzuG488/eIICOJrJgR2eOSxUoQkUCRv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/193644b22221479882297ab9365a8801~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776537609\u0026x-signature=kZ%2Fu8u2bqmXK%2F1AweoEyv8IZfGo%3D","user_id":"1195877041976983","user_name":"佐守"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1195877041976983","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113267002477576","book_info":{"abstract":"20世纪80年代后期，狼牙侦察大队狙击手何卫东为救观察手范天雷，被敌狙击手“蝎子”狙杀，儿子何晨光立志继承父志。15年后，范天雷已是狼牙特战狙击手参谋长，他鼓励全国青少年武术冠军何晨光、颇有射击天赋的社会青年王艳兵、朴实却有超常毅力的农村少年李二牛一起参军。新兵集训采用了侦察兵的魔鬼式训练，三人分到一个团后又被分到一个班，在种种磨炼中，令何晨光、王艳兵和李二牛成为了特种兵中的特种兵，与飞行员宋凯飞、来自武术世家的徐天龙组成了“红细胞”小组。未来还有许多危险在等待，成长还需要经历更多残酷的洗礼，他们克服种种困难，最终消灭各种黑暗势力，成功干掉了“蝎子”，站在了胜利的巅峰。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/ebe062f22344fef59731b7b9dde75209~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刘猛","author_id":"","book_id":"6855113267002477576","book_name":"利刃出鞘","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"74.2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":45,\"name\":\"影视小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=45\u0026name=影视小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":991,\"name\":\"国内影视\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=991\u0026name=国内影视\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6855113669420941838","read_count":"3675","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"360324"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"250","tags":"影视小说,国内影视","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/ebe062f22344fef59731b7b9dde75209~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779174442\u0026x-signature=VzjdgMiR38fEPufcPPaj67xbyX8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320150722416F9FDF97A8E1E297D7\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":47533,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":47533,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11114},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7270394404833100559","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看过了电视剧，再看原书，依然还是那么的让人激动、那么的心潮澎湃，致敬中国军人-人民的子弟兵！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692770766,"group_id":"6855113267002477576","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读自己喜欢的书，做自己喜欢的事！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7YeSHDzJ/yfbwmU4eeYlck=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4399333056","user_name":"追梦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4399333056","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113267002477576","book_info":{"abstract":"20世纪80年代后期，狼牙侦察大队狙击手何卫东为救观察手范天雷，被敌狙击手“蝎子”狙杀，儿子何晨光立志继承父志。15年后，范天雷已是狼牙特战狙击手参谋长，他鼓励全国青少年武术冠军何晨光、颇有射击天赋的社会青年王艳兵、朴实却有超常毅力的农村少年李二牛一起参军。新兵集训采用了侦察兵的魔鬼式训练，三人分到一个团后又被分到一个班，在种种磨炼中，令何晨光、王艳兵和李二牛成为了特种兵中的特种兵，与飞行员宋凯飞、来自武术世家的徐天龙组成了“红细胞”小组。未来还有许多危险在等待，成长还需要经历更多残酷的洗礼，他们克服种种困难，最终消灭各种黑暗势力，成功干掉了“蝎子”，站在了胜利的巅峰。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/ebe062f22344fef59731b7b9dde75209~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刘猛","author_id":"","book_id":"6855113267002477576","book_name":"利刃出鞘","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"74.2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":45,\"name\":\"影视小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=45\u0026name=影视小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":991,\"name\":\"国内影视\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=991\u0026name=国内影视\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6855113669420941838","read_count":"3675","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"360324"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"250","tags":"影视小说,国内影视","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/ebe062f22344fef59731b7b9dde75209~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779174442\u0026x-signature=VzjdgMiR38fEPufcPPaj67xbyX8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.3009993e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320150722416F9
